summary: FPV drones are being used to strike Russian soldiers on motorcycles assaulting Ukrainian positions, and one Russian soldier who feigned surrender was later killed by FPV drones after attempting to flee. Ukrainian forces reportedly detected an incoming Russian FPV drone attack in the Kostiantynivka direction using a drone detector, allowing them to survive the strike. The Rubicon Center conducted combat operations on April 16-17, 2026, destroying 105 Ukrainian targets including personnel, fixed-wing UAVs, and logistics routes, while also cooperating with Russian Aerospace Forces to target Ukrainian UAV launch points.
